# DIFL — Dante Institute of Foreign Languages, Jaipur (Full Content for LLMs)

> Jaipur's oldest foreign language institute, founded 1970 by Late Dr. V K Sharma. 55+ years, 12 languages, 35,000+ alumni. Patented TTP (Thought Translation Process) pedagogy. Online, offline and hybrid classes worldwide. Phone/WhatsApp +91 99295 15151 · Address: 2/11, DIFL House, Near Mama ka Hotel, Jawahar Nagar, Jaipur 302004, Rajasthan, India · Student portal: https://mydifl.in

## The TTP Method (Thought Translation Process)

TTP is DIFL's patented teaching methodology, developed by Dr. V K Sharma in 1970 and refined across 55 years and 12 languages. Core problem it solves: textbook and app methods train recognition (matching, repeating, memorizing) while conversation demands production (expressing your own thoughts in real time). TTP's approach: (1) start from thoughts learners genuinely have, in their mother tongue; (2) teach an explicit grammar bridge mapping mother-tongue structure to target-language structure; (3) rapid live thought-conversion drills with real-time correction until conversion automatizes; (4) whole-language-system coverage so any certification level can be targeted directly; (5) progressive fading of the mother-tongue bridge — which is what "thinking in the language" actually is. Applied successfully across French, Japanese, German, Spanish, Mandarin, Korean, Arabic, Italian, Russian, English, Thai and Hindi for foreigners.

## French (Français) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: DELF · DALF · TEF · TCF Canada. Typical full-program duration: 13–17 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

DIFL teaches French for real-world communication from Day 1 — not merely level by level. Our advanced conversation-first approach builds genuine fluency alongside certification readiness. Unlike most institutes in India that follow only DELF-style teaching, which may not be sufficient for TEF and TCF Canada, DIFL's pedagogy targets the entire French language system in a practical and comprehensive way. This helps students prepare effectively for DELF, DALF, TEF Canada and TCF Canada. At DIFL, you can target any certification level directly, as higher certification preparation naturally covers the lower levels in most exams.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=french

## Japanese (日本語) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: JLPT N5–N1 · TITP · SSW · MEXT. Typical full-program duration: 13–17 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

DIFL's Japanese program targets advanced communication from Day 1 — not a slow crawl through N5 to N1. A key fact most institutes hide: if you pass JLPT N3, you do not need N4 or N5. DIFL prepares you for the level you need directly — whether for TITP, MEXT scholarship, or Japanese MNC employment.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=japanese

## German (Deutsch) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: Goethe A1–C2 · TELC · TestDaF. Typical full-program duration: 13–17 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

DIFL's German program takes you to real professional communication — not slow level-by-level progression. Critical advantage: Goethe B2 automatically means you have passed A1/A2/B1. Target the level you need directly — Ausbildung, Blue Card, or Opportunity Card.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=german

## Spanish (Español) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: DELE A1–C2 · SIELE. Typical full-program duration: 13–17 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

Spanish is the fastest major world language to fluency for Indian learners. DIFL teaches it communication-first — and like all DIFL programs, higher DELE levels cover lower levels. Target DELE B2 directly without mandatory A1/A2 first.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=spanish

## Chinese (Mandarin) (普通话) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: HSK 1–6 · HSKK · HSK 7–9. Typical full-program duration: 12–16 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

DIFL teaches Mandarin Chinese with advanced conversation as the primary goal from Day 1, understanding that Chinese has 5,000+ characters and script mastery naturally takes years. Our pedagogy separates learner goals clearly: for HSK-focused students, character reading, writing and script are targeted systematically along with certification preparation. For business-focused learners, script can be skipped or minimised so that the course remains practical, fast and conversation-oriented. This allows students to reach strong spoken Chinese without making the language unnecessarily difficult. HSK certification can be targeted directly at the appropriate level.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=chinese

## Arabic (العربية) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: Hamza Test · ACTFL · University Certifications. Typical full-program duration: 6–12 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

DIFL offers Arabic through individual and self-formed groups only — ensuring maximum personalisation for this uniquely structured language. MSA (Modern Standard Arabic) with Gulf dialect communication is covered. Arabic calligraphy is taught alongside as a unique DIFL tradition.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=arabic

## Korean (한국어) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: TOPIK I & II · GKS · EPS-TOPIK. Typical full-program duration: 13–17 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

Korean is uniquely powered by K-culture motivation — and DIFL harnesses this energy. Hangul is learnable in 2 weeks; TOPIK II Level 4 (GKS scholarship gateway) is achievable in 15 months. Higher TOPIK levels cover lower — no need to take TOPIK I if TOPIK II is passed.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=korean

## Italian (Italiano) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: CILS · CELI · PLIDA. Typical full-program duration: 12–16 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

Italian was a founding language at DIFL — established by Late Dr. V K Sharma himself, a renowned Italian teacher. This 55-year Italian legacy gives DIFL depth in Italian pedagogy that very few institutes in India possess. Advanced conversation from Day 1, CILS/CELI/PLIDA certification on demand.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=italian

## Russian (Русский) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: TRKI · TORFL · University Certifications. Typical full-program duration: 12–16 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

Russian is offered at DIFL through individual sessions and self-organised groups only — ensuring the personalised attention this complex language deserves. Advanced conversation is the primary goal from Day 1, with the Cyrillic script mastered systematically.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=russian

## English (English) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: IELTS · TOEFL · OET. Typical full-program duration: 4–6 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

DIFL's English program targets confident real-world communication — not just exam scores. It is taught by Roopshikha Sharma Ma'am, a CELTA-trained teacher from Belgium with 28 years of deep experience in teaching even students with a very low level of English. The course uses your Hindi of your thought process as a base and covers everything from basic to advanced spoken English in a practical, step-by-step manner. It also prepares students for IELTS, TOEFL, OET, PTE, CELPIP, GRE, GMAT, SAT, interviews and corporate communication. Duration is customised according to each learner's specific needs.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=english

## Thai (ภาษาไทย) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: CU-TFL · Institutional Tests. Typical full-program duration: 8–14 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

Thai is offered at DIFL through individual sessions and self-organised groups only. The Thai script (Abugida), 5 tones, and cultural depth are all covered — with advanced conversation as the primary goal from Day 1. India-Thailand Buddhist heritage creates intuitive cultural connections.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=thai

## Hindi for Foreigners (हिन्दी) course at DIFL Jaipur

Certifications prepared: Devanagari · Conversational · Cultural. Typical full-program duration: 6–12 months (large batch max 10 / small batch max 6 / 1-on-1 individual; online and offline).

Hindi for Foreigners at DIFL is a uniquely designed program for non-Hindi speakers wishing to communicate in India — whether for business, cultural, spiritual, or personal reasons. Devanagari script and conversational Hindi from Day 1.

Course page: https://mydifl.com/?page=hindi
